decisions.title: Commit to Legend V2 migration across all chart types by Q2 2026
decisions.context: Multiple Legend V2 tickets (ENG-8544, 8546, 8547, 8548, 9639) signal systematic UI polish. This aligns with 'Nail the Core' pillar - improving core visualization experience. Decision: prioritize Legend V2 completion to unblock chart consistency.

arguments.for: Consistent UX increases decision velocity. Multiple parallel efforts suggest this is critical path for Explore V2.
arguments.against: Resource allocation may delay FedRAMP compliance work (ENG-9341, 9662) which has regulatory deadlines.

decisions.title: Accelerate Flink 2 migration to production
decisions.context: ENG-10076 configures Flink 2 alongside 1.17. CSRS caching (ENG-9789, 9457) and Kafka stability issues (ENG-10101) suggest infrastructure strain. This impacts 'Build the Moat' - technical foundation for scale. Decision needed: timeline for Flink 2 cutover.
decisions.blockedBy: Kafka-archiver stability must be resolved first (ENG-10101). Need staging validation before production.

arguments.for: Newer Flink version enables better performance for Canvas real-time features. Reduces technical debt.
arguments.against: Migration risk during Q2 when customer adoption of Canvas is accelerating. Could impact North Star metric if downtime occurs.

decisions.title: Standardize data import architecture before expanding file formats
decisions.context: FD-68 (low-level) and FD-43 (high-level) data import wrappers, plus ENG-10055 timestamp parsing improvements show architectural work in progress. 'Embed Deeper' requires flexible data ingestion. Decision: finalize architecture before adding more formats.

arguments.for: Clean architecture now prevents technical debt. Python Rules and Sift Edge need consistent import patterns.
arguments.against: Customer requests for specific formats (e.g., proprietary aerospace formats) may be delayed 2-3 weeks.

decisions.title: Invest in test infrastructure before scaling feature development
decisions.context: ENG-10098 (Playwright CI), ENG-10100 (e2e tests), ENG-10103 (E2 debug helpers) indicate testing gaps. With Canvas and Explore V2 in growth phase, quality gates are critical. Decision: dedicate 20% sprint capacity to test infra for 2 sprints.

arguments.for: Prevents regression bugs that erode customer trust. Essential for 'Nail the Core' - reliability increases decisions captured.
arguments.against: Slows feature velocity by 20% short-term. Sales may push back if promised features slip.

decisions.title: Resolve multi-asset calculated channel bugs before promoting Canvas
decisions.context: ENG-10097 and ENG-9818 show panel config issues with multi-asset runs. Canvas is key 2026 product but bugs reduce decision quality. Decision: hold Canvas marketing push until these are resolved.

arguments.for: Bad early experience kills adoption. North Star metric requires accurate data presentation. Better to launch right than fast.
arguments.against: Competitor released similar feature last month. Delay risks market perception that Sift is behind.

keyResults.name: Explore V2 adoption: 65% of active users
FedRAMP compliance progress
keyResults.current: Log retention + Amplitude specs in flight

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy coordination week: 3 eng syncs, 2 FedRAMP planning sessions, roadmap reviews. 30 Linear tickets updated suggests execution is moving but need decision clarity on Flink migration and Legend V2 priority.
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks today - recommend blocking Thu/Fri AM for decision documentation
3 one-on-ones may surface additional blockers - capture in next standup
22 meetings this week is 80% of time - consider async updates for non-critical syncs
